message:
Add systematic numerical gradient verification for 22 unary VJP rules

Compares each VJP-computed gradient against central finite differences
(eps=1e-6) at representative evaluation points. Covers: Exp, Log, Sqrt,
Rsqrt, Sin, Cos, Tan, Asin, Acos, Atan, Sinh, Cosh, Tanh, Expm1,
Log1p, Square, Reciprocal, Logistic, Erf, Erfc, Neg, Abs.
All 22 tests pass within 1e-4 tolerance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
